Name: Rim Worlds Pirates
Description: The Rim Worlds Pirates are an organized gang of outlaw salvage teams and mech chop-shops, creating a steady flow of illegal parts to independent worlds along the frontier.
ReputationStatements: The great pirate-killing Commander wants to make amends? No way. Most of our crews want you dead.
Every new border governor thinks they can tame the Rim. They all learn otherwise.
I don't trust you. Don't take it personal — I don't trust anybody.
Raiding 101. Hit hard, salvage the wrecks, and leave before any friends show up. Think you can do that?
Got a prime target, ready for taking. Don’t start growing principles on me now.
Fight mean, drink hard and take no shit. That's the pirate life.
Commander, one of our crews has flagged something REAL special. You're gonna love this.
MissionSuccessStatements: Huh, they broke faster than expected. Good haul! The crew's drinking tonight.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Didn't get the prize, but you gave it a hell of a try.
BadFaithFailureStatements: For someone with your hardware, we expected better things. We expected professionals. We received panic.
